qa_pair.question: Search for skills related to code review in the SkillsMP marketplace. Among the results, find a skill that helps with pull request review automation. What is the full package identifier of that skill (e.g., 'owner/repo@skill-name')?
Search for skills related to React testing in the marketplace. How many distinct skill packages appear in the search results? Count only top-level packages, not individual skills within a package.
Use list_package_skills to inspect the 'vercel-labs/agent-skills' package without installing it. How many individual skills are available in this package?
Search for skills related to documentation generation in the marketplace. Find a skill that helps with writing technical documentation or API docs. What is the exact name of that skill?
Use list_package_skills on 'vercel-labs/agent-skills'. Which skill in the package is designed for creating MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers? Provide the exact skill name.
Search for skills related to CSS or frontend design in the marketplace. Find a skill that helps with creating beautiful visual designs or interfaces. What is the exact name of that skill?
Search for skills related to data visualization or creating charts and diagrams. Among the results, find a skill specifically for creating diagrams. What is the exact name of that skill?
Use list_package_skills to inspect 'vercel-labs/agent-skills'. Which skill in this package is designed for creating PDF files? Provide the exact skill name.
Search for skills related to Excel or spreadsheet processing. Find a skill that handles .xlsx files. What is the exact name of that skill?
Search for skills related to security or penetration testing. Find a skill designed for conducting security reviews of code changes. What is the exact name of that skill?
